statement.en: Denoising speech and audio signals by using models of human auditory perception
statement.summary: The full abstract for this thesis is available in the body of the thesis, and will be available when the embargo expires.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a provisional/preprint thesis (embargo indicated, future availability noted) with a deferred abstract. The core claim—that human auditory perception models improve speech/audio denoising—is theoretically sound and aligns with established psychoacoustics and signal processing, but cannot be fully evaluated without access to the methodology, results, and validation. The work is under institutional embargo, indicating it has not yet completed peer review or publication cycle.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 耳の知覚が無限に深まるとき、ノイズは周波数領域で消える。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 聴覚の内部宇宙が音波の乱れを秩序へと折りたたむ。
